name: Tomato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the onion and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally until softened but not browned.
2. Add the diced potatoes to the pot. Stir to combine with the onions. Cook for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
3. Add the canned tomatoes (or fresh tomatoes) and vegetable stock. Stir gently to mix all ingredients evenly.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15 to 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Use an immersion blender or a regular blender to puree the soup until smooth.
6. Return the puréed soup to the pot if it was removed during blending.
7. Stir in sea salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
8. Garnish with parsley before serving.
This recipe can be doubled easily and frozen for later use.
